articles.title: MXN: Policy easing signals and resilient currency – Societe Generale
articles.snippet: Societe Generale analysts note that Deputy Governor Galia Borja signaled Banxico has room to resume rate cuts, pointing to weak domestic demand, falling investment and a stronger Peso.

combined_text:
[1.00] MXN: Policy easing signals and resilient currency – Societe Generale
Societe Generale analysts note that Deputy Governor Galia Borja signaled Banxico has room to resume rate cuts, pointing to weak domestic demand, falling investment and a stronger Peso.
